scripts.mint: zsh -lc 'export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "nvm no está disponible en esta shell. Instálalo o carga nvm.sh en tu zsh." >&2; exit 1; }; nvm install 20 >/dev/null; nvm exec 20 npm exec --yes -- mintlify'
scripts.mint:dev: zsh -lc 'export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; command -v nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "nvm no está disponible en esta shell. Instálalo o carga nvm.sh en tu zsh." >&2; exit 1; }; nvm install 20 >/dev/null; nvm exec 20 npm exec --yes -- mintlify dev'
